description: Colombian drug trafficking cartel based in Medellín, founded in the late 1990s by Gerardo Santana Garza and Luis Mendez. It is a breakaway group from the Juárez Cartel and traffics cocaine, heroin, MDMA, fentanyl, marijuana, and pink cocaine. The cartel operates in Colombia, Mexico, and other regions, and has been involved in conflicts with former Juárez Cartel members.

country_links.evidence_quote: Territory: Medellín , Bogotá , parts of the Amazon natural region , Ciudad Juárez , Chiapas
country_links.context: The organization has territory in Ciudad Juárez and Chiapas, Mexico.
